title: Military Donations/Relief Programs * Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Military Donations/Relief Programs * Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OPERATION RAMP IT UP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and helps install wheelchair ramps. Also accepts donations of used aluminum wheelchair ramps. Financial donations are accepted to fund future projects and can be given in memory or honor of someone. 5299 Aspen Valley Drive Liberty Township, OH 45011 Eligibility: Military veterans or spouses of veterans who are confined to a wheelchair due to disability and have exhausted all other resources Hours: Not applicable Email (513) 404-2476 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
